{{CargoRelic
|name=Open Rotor Engine
|class_id=22488
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-28
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On May 28, 2009 AD, NASA first tested an Open Rotor Engine.<br>Open Rotor Engine, also known as the propfan engine, is a type of turbine engine without a fan duct. Although it looks very similar to a turboprop engine, it has a very high propeller speed because it has no gearbox. It has a speed and performance similar to that of a turbofan engine, but in terms of economy, it is closer to a turboprop engine...
|fame=32
|art=20
|fth=32
|civ=24
|tech=46
|ss1=Per 3 Hidden Treasures claimed, Snail ATK +1<br>Hidden Treasures Claimed: 150/150
|ss2=Per 3 Hidden Treasures claimed, Snail ATK +2<br>Hidden Treasures Claimed: 150/150
|ss3=Per 3 Hidden Treasures claimed, Snail ATK +3<br>Hidden Treasures Claimed: 150/150
|ss4=Per 3 Hidden Treasures claimed, Snail ATK +5<br>Hidden Treasures Claimed: 150/150
|ss7=Per 3 Hidden Treasures claimed, Snail ATK +5<br>Hidden Treasures Claimed: 150/150<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill I.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail HP +200
}}
